steps.title: Find b from "280% greater than 150"
steps.content: "280% greater than 150" means take 150 and add 280% of 150 to it: $b = 150 + 2.8 \times 150 = 150(1 + 2.8) = 150 \times 3.8$. Computing, $150 \times 3.8 = 450 + 120 = 570$, so $b = 570$.

steps.title: Find a from "35% less than b"
steps.content: "35% less than $b$" means subtract 35% of $b$ from $b$: $a = b - 0.35b = 0.65b = 0.65 \times 570$. Computing, $0.65 \times 570 = 370.5 = \dfrac{741}{2}$. Grid in 741/2 (or 370.5).
